description: Graduation exam configuration: 15 questions across 3 categories

full.description: Complete graduation exam with all 15 questions

quick.description: Quick exam with 2 questions per category

practice.description: Practice mode with knowledge questions only

knowledge.label: Knowledge & Understanding
knowledge.description: Tests understanding of OpenClaw concepts, 4C framework, and ecosystem

practical.label: Practical Application
practical.description: Tests ability to apply skills, configure agent, and solve real problems

reflection.label: Reflection & Growth
reflection.description: Tests self-awareness, growth recognition, and future planning
reflection.note: No single correct answer — scored on depth, specificity, and self-awareness

rubric.5: Excellent — comprehensive, accurate, demonstrates deep understanding
rubric.4: Good — mostly accurate with minor gaps
rubric.2: Developing — partial understanding with significant gaps
rubric.1: Minimal — attempted but largely incorrect or superficial
